repo.description: Vim-fork focused on extensibility and usability
repo.name: neovim

body:
Problem:
an empty `{ isIncomplete = true, items = {} }` ends completion instead of requerying.

Solution:
keep isIncomplete on empty lists and retrigger on keypress while incomplete.

Fix #40096

comment_data.body:
I tried this, will solve my issue, but I am not sure the wider context / implication
```suggestion
  if Context.isIncomplete then
```
comment_data.diff_hunk:
@@ -1049,38 +1054,42 @@ local function trigger(bufnr, clients, ctx)
       end
     end
     vim.fn.complete(start_col, matches)
+    Context.empty_incomplete = Context.isIncomplete and #matches == 0
   end)
 
   table.insert(Context.pending_requests, cancel_request)
 end
 
 --- @param handle vim.lsp.completion.BufHandle
 local function on_insert_char_pre(handle)
-  if vim.fn.pumvisible() ~= 0 then
-    if Context.isIncomplete then
-      reset_timer()
+  local pum_visible = vim.fn.pumvisible() ~= 0
+  if (pum_visible and Context.isIncomplete) or Context.empty_incomplete then

comment_data.body: Good catch. Dropped the pum check, now it requeries whenever the list is incomplete.
comment_data.diff_hunk:
@@ -1049,38 +1054,42 @@ local function trigger(bufnr, clients, ctx)
       end
     end
     vim.fn.complete(start_col, matches)
+    Context.empty_incomplete = Context.isIncomplete and #matches == 0
   end)
 
   table.insert(Context.pending_requests, cancel_request)
 end
 
 --- @param handle vim.lsp.completion.BufHandle
 local function on_insert_char_pre(handle)
-  if vim.fn.pumvisible() ~= 0 then
-    if Context.isIncomplete then
-      reset_timer()
+  local pum_visible = vim.fn.pumvisible() ~= 0
+  if (pum_visible and Context.isIncomplete) or Context.empty_incomplete then

comment_data.body: Could you please elaborate on how this change is related to the bug-fix of this PR?
comment_data.diff_hunk:
@@ -937,6 +937,8 @@ local function register_completedone(bufnr)
     local reason = api.nvim_get_vvar('event').reason ---@type string
     if reason == 'accept' then
       on_complete_done()
+    elseif reason == 'cancel' then

comment_data.body: For ease of reviewing and code maintenance, could you please comment on this PR and/or the source code itself the specific variations of https://microsoft.github.io/language-server-protocol/specifications/lsp/3.18/specification/#textDocument_completion that this code deals with? With the current code I'm having trouble understanding which are valid scenarios.
IMO this is incorrect behavior. Instead of suggesting workarounds, we should prioritize on changing this confusing behavior.
cancel the pum with `<C-e>` doesn't clear isIncomplete
comment_data.diff_hunk:
@@ -937,6 +937,8 @@ local function register_completedone(bufnr)
     local reason = api.nvim_get_vvar('event').reason ---@type string
     if reason == 'accept' then
       on_complete_done()
+    elseif reason == 'cancel' then

comment_regular_data.body: I can confirm the changes works very well for my usecase now :)
